User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account details, onboarding selections, parsed resume, and historical sessions on prep.ai

email.description: Email address associated with the account

domain.description: Active practice domain e.g. CSE, AIML

resumeProfile.description: Decoded resume structural fields and skills

sessions.description: Chronological history of adaptive mock interview results

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was generated

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was last modified

/users/{userId}.description: Individual persistent profiles secured by Firebase Auth UID
